sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Top tawh kibangzaw sem nuam lai ing,
A kiniamkhiat bang, a migit luat bang;
A thanop
bangin, a thuman mah bangin,
Hong vaikhak mah bang, kipia in sem nuam ing.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kei
hong sang in, Nang aa bek hi nuam ing,
Kei hong sang in, Nang aa bek hi nuam ing;
Ka hong thuum
hi, Topa hong siangsak in,
Hong sawp inla, hong kem tawntung ta in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa bang nisim
thu ngenngen nuam ing,
Thahat nuam lai ing, singlamteh pua ding;
Hanciam nuam lai ing, Ama gam
adingin,
Kha Siangtho sap lai, a vakthapte ading.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa bangin nungta in khang nuam
ing,
Amah bang mi dang itna lak nuam ing;
Galilee gam ah pumpi deihna nial bang,
Topa tawh a
tawntungin kibang nuam ing.
